operation.name: Insert
operation.sql: INSERT INTO push_task_outbox (task_id, user_id, pts, push_type, peer_type, peer_id, operation_id, push_partition_id, task_schema_version, task_codec, task_payload, status, publish_attempts, next_retry_at, published_topic, published_partition, published_offset, last_error_code, created_at, updated_at, published_at) VALUES (:task_id, :user_id, :pts, :push_type, :peer_type, :peer_id, :operation_id, :push_partition_id, :task_schema_version, :task_codec, :task_payload, :status, :publish_attempts, :next_retry_at, :published_topic, :published_partition, :published_offset, :last_error_code, NOW(6), NOW(6), :published_at)

operation.name: SelectPending
operation.sql: SELECT task_id, user_id, pts, push_type, peer_type, peer_id, operation_id, push_partition_id, task_schema_version, task_codec, task_payload, status, publish_attempts, next_retry_at, published_topic, published_partition, published_offset, last_error_code, created_at, updated_at, published_at FROM push_task_outbox WHERE status = :status AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= :next_retry_at) ORDER BY created_at LIMIT :limit

operation.name: MarkPublishing
operation.sql: UPDATE push_task_outbox SET status = :status, publish_attempts = publish_attempts + 1, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE task_id = :task_id

operation.name: MarkPublished
operation.sql: UPDATE push_task_outbox SET status = :status, published_topic = :published_topic, published_partition = :published_partition, published_offset = :published_offset, published_at = :published_at, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE task_id = :task_id

operation.name: MarkPublishFailed
operation.sql: UPDATE push_task_outbox SET status = :status, next_retry_at = :next_retry_at, last_error_code = :last_error_code, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE task_id = :task_id
